events.name: UNIT_CLICK

events.description: Emits UI:{endTurnEvent} with {} on end turn

overridableConfigKeys.label: Bg Color
overridableConfigKeys.description: Canvas background color — dark spooky-night tone

overridableConfigKeys.label: Features
overridableConfigKeys.description: Decorative graveyard features — crypt, gravestones, pumpkin, pine, lantern, coffin.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Tiles
overridableConfigKeys.description: 5×5 grid tile data — takes priority over entity-derived tiles.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Units
overridableConfigKeys.description: Initial unit roster (1 player Keeper + 3 enemies) — takes priority over entity-derived units.
